title: Post-040 Validation/Publication Or Rollback Decision

active_role: Olares Post-040 Validation Publication Decision Operator

sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source, runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, remote, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, publication, or old-clone mutation. closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 041 reconfirmed the Packet 040 host artifact remains exactly two files with host diff SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`, host diff hygiene still passing, workstation scoped source files still clean, and old clone untouched. It selected bounded workstation mirror validation as the single next packet because host executable validation remains blocked by missing no-install host dependencies while the workstation has existing dependency and app-local validation capability. Direct publication, rollback, and migration remain closed.
next_action: Open only Packet 042 bounded workstation mirror validation of the exact Packet 040 two-file source/test artifact. Do not publish directly and do not reopen migration from Packet 041.
